name: stripe
description: Stripe API and dashboard operations via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Stripe API and dashboard operations via MCP. Use when the user asks about Stripe payments, customers, subscriptions, invoices, products, pri
interface.longDescription: Stripe API and dashboard operations via MCP. Use when the user asks about Stripe payments, customers, subscriptions, invoices, products, prices, charges, refunds, payment intents, checkout sessions, webhooks, or any Stripe-related task. Triggers on "stripe", "payment", "subscription", "invoice", "checkout", "webhook".
